item.title: 2026-05-10 Metacurrencies in Chime
item.description: I have two hesitations about using Meta-currencies like Inspiration and Stunting because of my game-design goals in this Campaign, but maybe we can work out something similar that motivates players? My first hesitation is that one of my primary goals with this campaign is to encourage players to eng...

item.title: 2026-05-10 Shared Party Motivations
item.description: Right now, all Characters are connected via their entry point into the Campaign: They all come from a single dominant city in the region—currently just referred to as “The City” in the rules, fleshed out in a minimalist way in the Failed Careers section of the rules.

item.title: 2026-05-07 Character Creation Design Notes
item.description: Let’s start by discussing the Character Creation Rules in Chime.

item.title: 2026-05-04 Agenda For Next Campaign Discussion
item.description: Quick run through of the rules of Chime. How do you understand Narrative Action vs.

item.title: 2026-05-04 Playing in a 10+ Player TTRPG Game
item.description: This is likely your first TTRPG game with more than 10 players. Such a game brings it’s own challenges, but also it’s unique opportunities.
